emails.subject: RE: Information needs survey - extended
emails.body: RE: Information needs survey extended Jim, can you elaborate on "customer newsletter/monthly policy position" To:=09Hartfield, Rita

emails.subject: RE: Information needs survey - extended
emails.body: I think that EES would like to send out some regulatory information on a re= gular basis. Maybe qty instead of monthly. Nothing formal right now. Jim To:=09Steffes, James D.
